name: wxcode-admin-volt-energy
title: Volt Energy Admin
description: Dark-mode utility grid operations control-room dashboard — KPI tiles, regions/sites status board, dual-series load/generation chart, alerts table, and sites side panel. Amber + cyan accent on deep navy. Original archetype for energy and infrastructure operations.

query.en: Build me a dark-mode energy grid operations dashboard — control-room style, KPI tiles for load/generation/outages/efficiency, regional sites status board, dual-series load chart, alerts table.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark-mode energy grid operations dashboard — control-room style, KPI tiles for load/generation/outages/efficiency, regional sites status board, dual-series load chart, alerts table.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
